name: GitHub: Branch Protection Rules - Admins Not Enforced
query:
MATCH p=(:GH_BranchProtectionRule {enforce_admins: false})-[:GH_ProtectedBy]->(:GH_Branch)
RETURN p
LIMIT 1000
description: Finds branch protection rules where administrators can bypass all protections. Admins can push directly, skip reviews, and override status checks on these branches.
